experiment: m0a-llmproxy — STAND-IN mapper measurement (pinned blind cross-vendor LLM judges the 300 pinned M0a annotation-sample mappings), yielding LLM-proxy precision/recall that REPLACE the 2026-07-07 non-blind agent-judged provisionals while remaining NOT the pre-registered human pass
candidate: phrase-to-concept mapper (the m0 line; the measurement leg every mapper-consuming design, E1 data builds first, cites)
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/m0a-llmproxy.json, following the f2b-transfer-llmproxy proxy-assessment precedent. Scope discipline per tasking: this file + registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json + assumptions.jsonl block ASM-0647-0659 ONLY; registry/audit-status.jsonl NOT touched (update lines reported to the coordinator); no verdict, experiment record, amendment, audit, log, or run artifact modified; no git/bd/kb-sync run; concurrent g3 runner + 2 Codex audits on disjoint files untouched.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the kern Fable/Opus execution split: the Opus runner produced only the mechanical run + verdict-gen output (registry/verdicts/m0a-llmproxy.json, PASS-PENDING-AUDIT, fired rule adjudication_valid AND probe_valid); what that PASS MEANS — and whether it requires a Gate-A audit — is decided here and only here. The frozen record's extrapolation_envelope_verbatim is adopted BINDING and quoted where load-bearing; every number below is a proxy quantity inside that envelope and none of it is, or ever becomes, the human M0a finding.

verdict_ref.fired_rule: adjudication_valid AND probe_valid (PASS means exactly: a valid blind-LLM proxy measurement of the M0a quantities exists; NO hypothesis kill bar exists by design)
verdict_ref._verdict_note: ASSESSMENT-CONDITIONAL-ON-AUDIT: per the audit_ruling below (ASM-0647) the Gate-A cross-vendor audit is REQUIRED and pending at assessment time. The sha256 above pins the pre-audit verdict bytes this assessment interprets. If the audit does not CONFIRM, every MEASURED tag on a derived quantity below (P/R, miss rates, bounds) is SUSPENDED and this assessment must be revisited; the raw per-item labels and instrument-gate facts are hash-chained independently and survive either way. The in-place PASS-PENDING-AUDIT -> PASS upgrade after a CONFIRM is the Opus runner lane's mechanical step (f2b-replicate precedent), not this record's.

parent_human_prereg.path: docs/poc-design.md (Phase M, M0a: 'mapper precision/recall against human annotation'; published before E1; TinyStories favourable-case stated verbatim)
parent_human_prereg.items: mapper/m0/annotation-sample.jsonl sha256 038604a8d7d0fa160209805374b5c89dd5a044c552d1e0dafe0d2bd028575a2c — the human pass over these 300 items remains the sole gold standard and the only discharger of the pre-registration

replaced_provisionals.numbers: agent-judged (NON-BLIND, project-contexted, Claude-family, 2026-07-07): strict P 0.82 (concept 0.82 / prime 0.82), lenient P 0.8968; strict R 0.8865, lenient 0.8952, R-LB95 0.6825; abstain-miss 0.36; none-miss 0.0 (upper95 0.0582); 11 'unclear' labels across mapped strata

_surprise_note: No registered prior exists for the proxy P/R (the M0a pre-registration is a measurement with no bar, and the proxy record deliberately declined to invent one), so no surprise-* tag is licensed. Informally, quotable only as context: both headline quantities moved AGAINST the mapper relative to the non-blind agent stopgap — strict P 0.82 -> 0.7143 (delta -0.106; concept -0.13, prime -0.10) and strict R 0.8865 -> 0.8419 (delta -0.045, driven by abstain-miss 0.36 -> 0.46) — under a judge that upgraded exactly two properties: blindness and author-family independence. Direction is consistent with the design's motivating suspicion (the non-blind agent pass was the weakest link) but attribution is unattributable in-design [EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0543]. The none stratum, pre-flagged as the thinnest and the one whose nonzero miss would be the loudest alarm, came out 0/50 again.

audit_ruling.ruling: GATE-A AUDIT REQUIRED for m0a-llmproxy [STIPULATED: ASM-0647]. The coordinator should DISPATCH a cross-vendor Codex Gate-A audit (mechanical recomputation from pinned bytes, per the frozen stage_discipline); the verdict remains PASS-PENDING-AUDIT until CONFIRM, and this assessment is conditional on that CONFIRM as stated in _verdict_note.
audit_ruling.grounds: (1) House discipline: the audit gate fires on PASS — every registry PASS carries a CONFIRMED Gate-A audit, including the directly analogous QUARANTINED weak-proxy PASS f2b-transfer-llmproxy [MEASURED: registry/audits/f2b-transfer-llmproxy/1-gate-a-codex.json, CONFIRMED 11/11]. Quarantine caps the MEANING of the verdict, not its arithmetic. (2) These numbers will be CITED: the proxy P/R replace the agent-judged provisionals as the programme's provisional numbers in every artifact (frozen envelope, binding), and E1 data-build decisions consume them — the population-weighted estimator, strict/lenient duality, and Clopper-Pearson recall bound are precisely the arithmetic class an independent recompute catches. (3) The frozen stage_discipline names the cross-vendor audit stage explicitly, with the judge-family overlap pre-disclosed and pre-bounded ('mechanical recomputation from pinned bytes and does not validate judge quality'). (4) The human-gold pass CANNOT discharge the audit function: it measures a different estimand (human judgment) on a human-availability timeline and never re-verifies this record's estimator arithmetic; treating it as the audit would leave the citable provisional numbers permanently unverified.
audit_ruling.coordinator_action: Dispatch Codex Gate-A for m0a-llmproxy (auditor family overlap with judge-m1p to be disclosed in the audit record, per the frozen text). After CONFIRM: runner lane performs the in-place verdict upgrade; audit-status codex_audited pending -> done. If NOT confirmed: boundary-stop to Fable, this assessment suspends.

interpretation.headline: The proxy fired its only designed outcome: a valid blind proxy measurement of the M0a quantities now EXISTS — 300/300 items labelled (every stratum floor exceeded), retest 0.9667, deranged-gloss probe false-endorsement 0/40, preflight first-attempt pass [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/m0a-llmproxy.json, pending Gate-A per audit_ruling]. PASS means exactly that and nothing more — the frozen envelope's clause 4 verbatim: 'a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM completed the M0a annotation task at instrument-valid coverage with a demonstrated working deranged-gloss control'; it 'does NOT discharge the M0a pre-registration, is NOT a mapper-quality endorsement'. The measured proxy quantities, now the programme's provisional numbers under a mandatory WEAK-PROXY label [STIPULATED: ASM-0550, ASM-0540]: strict P 0.7143 (concept 0.69 / prime 0.72), strict R 0.8419, R-LB95 0.6349, abstain-miss 0.46, none-miss 0.0 (CP-upper95 0.0582) — replacing the non-blind agent-judged 0.82 / 0.8865 / 0.6825 / 0.36 / 0.0. FRONT AND CENTRE, THE ENVELOPE: the judge species is still LLM; only blindness and author-family independence were upgraded; the human pass over the same 300 items remains the sole gold standard and the real gate. The informative direction is the LOW-precision one, and it is the direction the data moved: per the materiality ruling [STIPULATED: ASM-0649] the envelope's early-warning clause fires in ADVISORY form — E1 data-build consumers must carry a declared 'precision possibly ~0.7 in mapped strata' risk line pending human M0a, and the maintainer is flagged; NOT a stop, because the delta is unattributable (ASM-0543), no kill bar exists by design, and the recall floor (none stratum) is clean.
interpretation.what_the_numbers_say: Four separable measured facts, all proxy-estimand-scoped. (1) PRECISION IS THE STORY: under the blind cross-vendor judge, ~29% of mapped-strata decisions were judged wrong-sense (concept 31/100, prime 28/100 incorrect), against ~18% under the non-blind agent. Per-item agreement between the two judges on mapped strata is only 0.81/0.80 — about 1 in 5 items flips between them — so the two passes genuinely disagree at the item level; this is not a rounding difference [MEASURED: analysis-output agent_agreement_by_stratum]. (2) THE STRICT/LENIENT DUALITY COLLAPSED: proxy strict == lenient on both P and R because the judge issued ZERO 'unclear' labels over 200 mapped-strata items (the agent issued 11). The blind judge is maximally decisive; 'unclear' carried no mass, so the strict/lenient pair carries no information in the proxy pass, and comparisons against the agent's lenient numbers should not be made. (3) RECALL MOVED ONLY VIA ABSTAIN-MISS: 23/50 abstain items (0.46, vs agent 0.36) were judged to have a correct candidate the mapper declined — a recall/coverage cost (the mapper maps less than it defensibly could), not a correctness alarm. (4) THE NONE STRATUM HELD: 0/50 should-map judgments on the stratum covering 78% of token mass — the loudest possible alarm (a nonzero none-miss) did NOT fire, and the pre-existing thin-coverage discipline stands unchanged: R-LB95 0.6349 is driven by the Clopper-Pearson upper bound on a 50-item sample, i.e. by sampling thinness, not by any observed miss [STIPULATED: ASM-0542 — the proxy fixes NONE of the sampling design].
interpretation.favourable_case_caveats_intact: Everything above sits inside the parent design's own limits, all pre-registered and untouched by the proxy [STIPULATED: ASM-0542; envelope clause 3 verbatim: 'DESIGN LIMITS CARRY OVER UNCHANGED']: TinyStories is the pre-registered FAVOURABLE-CASE domain ('semantically clean 1.5k-word domain... near-exact mapping by construction'), so 0.71 precision here bounds nothing about harder domains except by the a-fortiori reading (a favourable-case number this size is more concerning, not less); stratum-population reweighting is stipulated from the published report; the none stratum is 50 items over 2,958,417 tokens; and the WSD-competence gap [envelope clause 2] means the LLM's sense judgments approximate human annotation with unproven offsets concentrated exactly where the agent pass located the error mass (light-verb, phrasal, idiomatic, auxiliary uses).
licenses: [MEASURED, pending Gate-A] H-M0AP-MEASURE at exactly its construction: a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM completed the full 300-item M0a annotation task blind, instrument-valid (300/300 labelled, all stratum floors, retest 0.9667 >= 0.80, probe 0/40 false-endorsement < 0.30, per-call blinding grep zero hits). The measurement instrument for blind LLM-proxy annotation of mapper outputs is demonstrated end-to-end.

[MEASURED, pending Gate-A] The programme's provisional mapper numbers are now: strict P 0.7143 (concept 0.69 / prime 0.72), strict R 0.8419, R-LB95 0.6349, abstain-miss 0.46, none-miss 0.0 (upper95 0.0582) — WEAK-PROXY-labelled in every citation, replacing the agent-judged provisionals per the frozen record's own replacement rule. The replaced numbers (P 0.82 / R 0.8865) may no longer be cited as current anywhere.

[MEASURED] The crude gloss-endorsement leniency channel is bounded at zero for this judge (deranged-gloss probe 0/40 false endorsements): the judge demonstrably rejects wrong-for-the-context glosses, so its 'correct' labels are not reflexive gloss acceptance (H-M0AP-STYLE crude form closed). Note the asymmetry: this bounds the channel that would fabricate HIGH precision; the observed precision is LOW, making the probe's cleanliness supporting evidence that the low number is judgment, not noise.

[STIPULATED: ASM-0649] The decision content: E1 data-build engineering may proceed consuming mapper outputs, PROVIDED every consuming design/claim carries the declared risk line 'mapper precision possibly ~0.7 in mapped strata (WEAK-PROXY, pending human M0a)'; maintainer flagged; abstain-miss 0.46 carried as a coverage cost note. Continued investment in the mapper line (human annotator sourcing, mapper engineering) is licensed per envelope clause 5 — and nothing more.

[MEASURED] The comparator for the human pass is pinned twice over: per-item proxy labels on the exact 300 item bytes (free human-vs-proxy bias measurement, ASM-0553) AND a per-item proxy-vs-agent disagreement list (~1 in 5 mapped-strata items), so the eventual human pass simultaneously attributes the 0.82-vs-0.71 delta (ASM-0543's registered resolution) at zero marginal cost. As with the f2b and g9 proxies, this comparator role is the record's most durable scientific value.
does_not_license: [ENVELOPE-BOUND, clause 4 verbatim — the ceiling] The PASS 'does NOT discharge the M0a pre-registration, is NOT a mapper-quality endorsement, does NOT validate the mapper for any downstream experiment whose frozen record names human annotation, and does NOT extend to other corpora, other domains, natural-user distributions, or any coverage-general claim'. Every citation of P 0.7143 / R 0.8419 inherits this sentence plus the WEAK-PROXY label.

[EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0543] 'The mapper's true precision is ~0.71' is NOT licensed, and neither is 'the agent pass was inflated': the 0.106 delta measures blindness effects + judge-family effects + genuine mapper error JOINTLY and attributes nothing. Equally unlicensed: 'the blind judge is closer to truth' — better-controlled is not the same as more accurate on WSD (envelope clause 2, competence gap unproven in direction).

[ENVELOPE-BOUND, clause 1] Single cross-vendor judge: family-level severity or leniency moves P/R independent of real mapper quality; the retest floor is stability only; no second judge exists in this design.

[DESIGN-BOUND] No statement about token-mass coverage, corpus engagement, or any E1 OUTCOME: this record measured an annotation instrument over pinned mapper outputs — it is not a lift, not a transfer result, and moves no E-series hypothesis. The E1 connection is risk-disclosure on inputs (ASM-0649), nothing more.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND, mandatory coverage restatement] Kernel-expressibility coverage is 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; all mapper numbers here are TinyStories-favourable-case, kernel-v0-indexed, and extend to no other kernel state or domain.

[BINDING-NOTE] The human M0a pass is untouched and unconsumed: annotation-sample.jsonl bytes byte-identical, proxy labels quarantined from any future human annotator (ASM-0553 — violation is a boundary-stop incident).

forks_resolved.resolution: SUPPORTED at the proxy's construction: the blind annotation task completed instrument-valid (300/300, floors met, retest 0.9667, probe clean); a valid proxy measurement exists. Capped verbatim at WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY; conditional on Gate-A CONFIRM (ASM-0647).

CRUDE FORM BOUNDED AT ZERO: deranged-gloss false-endorsement 0/40, so the instrument stands. The channel it bounds would fabricate HIGH precision; the measured precision is LOW — the probe's cleanliness therefore supports reading 0.7143 as judgment rather than leniency noise, while the subtle familiarity/competence channels stay open by design.

MEASURED, UNATTRIBUTED BY DESIGN: per-stratum proxy-vs-agent raw agreement concept 0.81 / prime 0.80 / abstain 0.90 / none 1.0. The mapped-strata disagreement mass (~1 in 5 items) is real and item-pinned; attribution belongs solely to the human pass (ASM-0543 resolution path). Never validation in either direction.

mechanism_state: alive-with-declared-risk: the mapper line continues (no kill bar exists, none was fired, the none-stratum floor is clean), but the programme's provisional precision dropped 0.82 -> 0.7143 under the better-controlled judge and every downstream consumer now carries the ASM-0649 risk line pending the human M0a pass, which is promoted in value (it now attributes the delta as well as discharging the pre-registration).

questions_opened.question: REAFFIRMED AND SHARPENED, not new: run the pre-registered human annotation pass over the same 300 items. It was always the sole discharger of the M0a pre-registration; it is now also the attribution instrument for the 0.82-vs-0.71 agent-vs-proxy delta (ASM-0543) and the human-vs-proxy bias measurement (ASM-0553), both free once it runs. Quarantine binds: the annotator must never see proxy or agent labels first.
blocking: human-grade mapper validation for any frozen record naming human annotation

questions_opened.question: $0 exploratory re-analysis of already-logged data (kern re-analyse-before-GPU rule): characterise the ~40 mapped-strata items where the blind proxy and the non-blind agent disagree — are they concentrated in the light-verb/phrasal/idiomatic/auxiliary classes where the agent pass located the error mass? Directs mapper-engineering priorities BEFORE any human or GPU spend. Quarantined phase:exploratory; outputs never reach the human annotator (ASM-0553).

GENERALISED CAUTION from this record's finding: the AMENDMENT A1 shadowed-concept policy (docs/poc-design.md — sense-priority tiers for {inside, near, broken}, sense-correct 100%/100%/86%, ~129 declared wrong-sense tokens, feeding E1's 52-concept set) rests on the SAME species of non-blind agent-judged samples that this proxy just downgraded by ~0.11 on the main sample. Run the same blind-proxy protocol over those per-concept samples (or fold them into the human pass) before E1 shard builds treat 100%/100%/86% as solid.
blocking: confidence in E1's declared wrong-sense token count
questions_opened.note: requires its own prereg + fresh id; the human audit for these samples is already flagged pending in the A1 text (bead dix)

questions_opened.question: OPTIONAL, cheap: the R-LB95 (0.6349) is dominated by Clopper-Pearson thinness on the 50-item none stratum, not by any observed miss (0/50 twice now, agent and proxy). A blind-proxy pass over a larger none sample (200-300 items, ~$5) would tighten the bound substantially at proxy grade. Only worth running if a downstream design needs a tighter provisional recall floor before the human pass lands; the human pass remains the gate regardless.

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED planning estimates, never measurements. The human pass is the only entry that discharges anything; the rest is cheap risk-shaping around the proxy signal.

ledger_updates.statement: STAND-IN mapper measurement PASS (pending Gate-A CONFIRM): a pinned blind cross-vendor LLM completed the 300-item M0a annotation task instrument-valid (300/300, retest 0.9667, deranged-gloss probe 0/40). Proxy quantities replace the agent-judged provisionals as the programme's provisional mapper numbers: strict P 0.7143 (concept 0.69 / prime 0.72), strict R 0.8419, R-LB95 0.6349, abstain-miss 0.46, none-miss 0.0 (upper95 0.0582).
ledger_updates.scope: WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0550); single GPT-5.x-family judge; TinyStories favourable case, kernel-v0, stipulated populations (ASM-0542); coverage 0.3542 @ molecules-v0 (m0b), not general; discharges NOTHING of the human pre-registration

ledger_updates.statement: Precision materiality ruling (ASM-0649): 0.7143 strict precision under the blind judge — 0.106 below the non-blind agent provisional, with ~1-in-5 per-item mapped-strata disagreement — fires the envelope's low-precision early-warning clause in ADVISORY form: maintainer flagged; every mapper-consuming design (E1 data builds first) carries the declared risk line 'mapper precision possibly ~0.7 in mapped strata (WEAK-PROXY, pending human M0a)'. Not a stop; attribution unproven (ASM-0543); recall floor clean.
ledger_updates.scope: mapper line sequencing; falls away when the human M0a pass attributes or retires it

ledger_updates.statement: Blind-proxy annotation instrument facts: zero 'unclear' labels over 200 mapped-strata items (strict/lenient duality collapsed — the proxy strict==lenient identity is a judge-decisiveness property, and agent-lenient comparisons are invalid); deranged-gloss probe 0/40; proxy-vs-agent agreement concept 0.81 / prime 0.80 / abstain 0.90 / none 1.0 (joint blindness+family diagnostic, never validation).
ledger_updates.scope: this judge, this pinned invocation (codex-cli 0.144.1, effort low), the pinned 300 item bytes

ledger_updates.statement: ASM-0540/0541/0542/0544/0550/0551/0553 honoured in execution; ASM-0543 stays open with its comparator now pinned (per-item proxy labels + disagreement list); ASM-0552's upward channel noted as NOT sufficient to produce a high number here (observed precision is low); ASM-0647 (audit required) and ASM-0649 (materiality ruling) newly registered by this assessment.

tree_impact: Mapper (m0) line: NO promotion, NO demotion of any mapper claim — the M0a pre-registration remains undischarged and the human pass remains the gate. What changes: (1) the programme's PROVISIONAL mapper numbers are re-based downward onto better-controlled measurements (strict P 0.82 -> 0.7143, strict R 0.8865 -> 0.8419, WEAK-PROXY-labelled), and the old agent-judged numbers lose citation currency everywhere; (2) the ASM-0649 advisory binds every mapper-consuming design — E1 data builds first, since M0a is pre-registered to publish before E1 and E1's kernel-frozen corpus is mapper-built — with the declared 'precision possibly ~0.7 in mapped strata' risk line, plus the abstain-miss 0.46 coverage cost note; (3) the human M0a pass gains a second job (delta attribution, ASM-0543) at zero marginal cost via the pinned per-item labels; (4) a generalisation flag opens on the AMENDMENT A1 shadowed-concept figures, which are the same species of non-blind agent judgment this record just showed can sit ~0.11 above a blind cross-vendor reading (stub shadowed-policy-blind-check); (5) cross-lane: read jointly with g9-llmproxy's FAIL-analog (same day, same judge mechanism, both instrument-clean), the llmproxy stand-in wave is delivering differentiated, non-rubber-stamp signals — one fired kill-analog, one moderate-precision measurement with a clean recall floor — which is the behaviour ASM-0550's policy was adopted to buy. Verdict standing: PASS-PENDING-AUDIT; Gate-A REQUIRED (ASM-0647); assessment conditional on CONFIRM.
